title: Tirucherai Saranathan Temple
tagline: Tirucherai Saranathan Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Saranathan Temple in Thirucherai, a village on the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu.
overview.description: The Saranathan Temple in Thirucherai, a village on the outskirts of Kumbakonam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. The temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Saranathan and his consort Lakshmi as Saranayaki. It is believed that Saranathan appeared for Kaveri, the river goddess, who performed penance at this place. The temple is believed to be of significant antiquity with contribut

topPlaces.name: Tirucherai Gnanaparameswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Tirucherai Gnanaparameswarar Temple is a Tevara sthalam located in the village of Tirucherai near Kudavasal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The place is located at a distance of 14 km south of Kumbakonam and 4 km north of Kudavasal.

topPlaces.name: Thirucherai
topPlaces.description: Thirucherai is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is bordered by Aandiruppu to the east.

topPlaces.name: Jambukaranyesvarar Temple, Kundalur
topPlaces.description: Jambukaranyesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Kundalur in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sarguneswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sarvaguneswarar Temple (சற்குணேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the village of Karuveli in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is 500–1000 years old and dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Koonthalur
topPlaces.description: Koonthalur is a small riverside village situated 20 km from Kumbakonam on the way to Karaikal in the route of Koothanur Saraswathi Temple. Koonthalur keeps traditional, natural originality by the way of Green Coconut Trees and Paddy forms.

topPlaces.name: Kadalangudi
topPlaces.description: Kadalangudi is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Adambar Ukkadai
topPlaces.description: Adambar Ukkadai is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vadamattam

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirucherai Saranathan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirucherai Saranathan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirucherai Saranathan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (93 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirucherai Saranathan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirucherai Saranathan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirucherai Saranathan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirucherai Saranathan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirucherai Saranathan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tirucherai Gnanaparameswarar Temple, Thirucherai, Jambukaranyesvarar Temple, Kundalur, Sarguneswarar Temple, Koonthalur.
